discovery.run_summary: Tape is broadly risk-on with semis (SMH +1.5%) and small caps (IWM +0.9%) leading, though NVDA and GOOGL lag. VIX subdued near 16.7. A few mid-caps showing outsized moves without obvious filed catalysts — QRVO and AVAV stand out for follow-through that warrants scrutiny.

notable_index_moves: SMH +1.5% leading, but NVDA -1.9% diverging — broadening within semis away from the leader
XLC -0.55% only red sector, weighed by GOOGL -1.2%
IWM +0.93% small caps participating, consistent with risk-on with breadth

discoveries.name: Qorvo, Inc.
discoveries.setup: Mid-cap semi extending a multi-day rally with no filed catalyst on a strong SMH tape
discoveries.thesis: Sharp single-day pop on top of an already extended five-day run, but no 8-K, no scheduled earnings, and no headline I can tie to it. Could be M&A speculation (Qorvo has been a recurring takeout rumor name in RF semis), an analyst upgrade, or sympathy with the semi rally — I cannot distinguish at conf 3+.
discoveries.what_confirms: If a takeout rumor, analyst upgrade, or activist filing surfaces in next 24-48 hours; a follow-up 8-K would lock it in
discoveries.what_kills: If move reverses sharply on no news, indicating it was a squeeze or sympathy froth rather than catalyst-driven
discoveries.what_to_learn: Mid-cap semis with persistent takeout speculation (QRVO, SWKS) can move on rumor without filed evidence — empty catalyst_signals on a 9% pop is itself a tell to check options flow and chatter
discoveries.catalyst: Unknown — no 8-K, no earnings, strong semi tape (SMH +1.5%) but QRVO's move is well above sector
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: catalyst_signals is empty; move magnitude exceeds what sector sympathy alone explains
research_pointers: Scan for renewed Skyworks/Qorvo merger chatter — perennial pairing
Check unusual options activity in QRVO calls
Look at RF peer SWKS for sympathy confirmation

discoveries.name: AeroVironment, Inc.
discoveries.setup: Defense small-cap rallying with no filed catalyst against a modest defense ETF (ITA +1%) backdrop
discoveries.thesis: AVAV (drones) is moving substantially above its sector. Iran conflict ongoing per news flow could be driving drone-specific bid, and Kalshi traders are speculating on Anduril as next US govt stake — possible defense-tech speculation spillover. But no 8-K, no earnings catalyst, can't confirm direction with conviction.
discoveries.what_confirms: Confirmation of Iran-related drone contract news; broader unmanned-systems peer rally (KTOS, RCAT)
discoveries.what_kills: Iran de-escalation news (Rubio mentioned 'good signs' on peace progress) would undercut the geopolitical-bid thesis quickly
discoveries.catalyst: Likely Iran/defense geopolitical bid + Anduril/govt-stake speculation spillover, but unconfirmed
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: Empty catalyst_signals; contextual news cites ongoing Iran conflict and govt-stake speculation around defense tech
research_pointers: Check unmanned-systems peers (KTOS, RCAT, ONDS) for sympathy pattern
Look for any DoD contract awards published 5/22
Track Iran ceasefire headlines as potential reversal trigger

discoveries.name: Badger Meter, Inc.
discoveries.setup: Reg FD disclosure 8-K coinciding with multi-day grind higher
discoveries.thesis: BMI filed an Item 7.01 Reg FD disclosure on 5/21 — typically investor day slides, conference presentation, or guidance reaffirmation. The pop with extended 5-day move is consistent with a positive Reg FD item (e.g., capital allocation update or guide reaffirmation). Move magnitude is moderate and proportional to a positive disclosure.
discoveries.what_confirms: 8-K exhibit shows raised guidance, capital return, or strategic update
discoveries.what_kills: Exhibit is boilerplate conference deck with no new information — would suggest move is momentum-driven, not catalyst
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: 7.01 + 9.01 filing pattern indicates a disclosed presentation or release; cannot judge content from codes alone
research_pointers: Read the 8-K exhibit to identify what was disclosed
Check if BMI presented at a 5/21 investor conference

discoveries.name: Extreme Networks, Inc.
discoveries.setup: Small-cap networking name spiking on no filed catalyst, below-average volume
discoveries.thesis: 7% pop on volume multiple of 0.89x is unusual — moves of this size usually carry volume. Empty catalyst_signals. Could be sympathy with networking/AI infrastructure trade or a thin-volume technical squeeze. Cannot articulate either bull or bear thesis at conf 3+.
discoveries.what_confirms: Networking peer move (ANET, JNPR, CSCO) confirming sector bid; or surfacing of analyst note
discoveries.what_kills: Reversal on equal low volume — would confirm illiquid noise rather than real bid
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: No 8-K, no earnings, sub-average volume despite large move
research_pointers: Look for analyst initiations or upgrades on EXTR
Be wary — low-volume mid-cap moves often round-trip

discovery.no_signals_note: Several movers today have empty catalyst_signals — flagging as UNCLEAR rather than manufacturing theses. The honest read is that today's mover list is dominated by sympathy/speculative bids on a risk-on tape, not specific company catalysts. AVAV deserves geopolitical-watch status given live Iran headlines.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: AeroVironment is a defense/drone play; SpaceX IPO buzz lifts aerospace/defense sentiment broadly. AVAV also benefits from autonomous/AI-driven drone narrative independent of SpaceX.
research_pointers: Check if AVAV had a company-specific catalyst (contract award, earnings prep)

ai_analysis.no_signals_note: Today's news flow is thin on AI catalysts that map to the listed movers. QRVO (+8.9%), EXTR (+7.1%), BMI (+4.7%) movements are not explained by any AI announcement in this batch — likely company-specific (QRVO possibly M&A/analyst-driven semis; BMI has an 8-K Reg FD disclosure worth reading).
